title: cyphostemma engleri
intro: Cyphostemma engleri, also known as the "living stone plant" or "resurrection succulent", is a unique and low-maintenance succulent plant that belongs to the grapevine family (Vitaceae). Traditionally used in African herbal medicine, Cyphostemma engleri has been found to have various medicinal properties, including antioxidant, anti-inflammatory, and antiseptic activities. The plant is believed to have several health benefits, including reducing stress and anxiety, improving cardiovascular health, and promoting wound healing. Cyphostemma engleri can be used in various herbal preparations, such as teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be consumed to reap its medicinal benefits.
